SEBASTIAN
This Bouvetoya Island really that
dangerous?
LEX
Yes.
SEBASTIAN
Then I hope you'll reconsider
coming with us:
MILLER
I, for one, have come to depend on
you greatly.
(Lex smiles)
Come on, don't make me pull out
pictures of my kids again.
LEX
Your kids aren't that cute.
The three of them share a laugh.
MAX (O.S.)
Ms. Kline.
Lex turns around to see Max.
MAX {CONT'D)
Your helicopter is ready.

SEBASTIAN
Witch's cauldron?
LEX
The 'Separator. ' Throw whale
blubber in, heat it, separate out
the fat. Whale oil was big
business back then.
The harbor leading to the whaling station is totally frozen
over. Sebastian stares down at the thick ice.
SEBASTIAN
How did they get ships in here?
LEX
The station only operated in the
summer months, when the pack ice
would melt. It was abandoned in
nineteen a-four.
SEBASTIAN
How come?
LEX
Nothing left to hunt. They'd wiped
out the entire population of
Antarctic whales. Total genocide.

EXT. MOUTH OF THE TUNNEL - PERPETUAL TWILIGHT 47.
The whaling station is already in the grip of the katabatic
winds. Quinn struggles through-the snow, barking orders above
the DEAFENING STORM.
QUINN
I told you to get that ti~d down!
Get everybody under cover!
Tents are being uprooted by the wind. Flung through the air
like tissue paper.
QUINN (CONT'D)
Everyone inside! Move it! Now!
Quinn shepherds his men into the buildings of the Whaling
Station.
QUINN (CONT'D)
Go! Go!

CONNORS *
Hello! Help me! .Somebody. Get me out of here!
INT. PYRAMID - VINCENZO AND MILLER'S CELL
Connors cry for help is barely audible. But right now
Vincenzo and Miller have their own problems.
VINCENZO
What are those things .. Did you see
the way they killed Bass and Stone?
(snaps his fingers)
I was shooting right at one! I hit
it! Dead on. It didn't go down.
It didn't even slow down.

INT. PYRAMID - CORRIDOR 90D.
Lex and Sebastian exit the labyrinth. They hear the
Predator's victory cry. Lex stops.
LEX
Weyland!
SEBASTIAN
You can't help him.
He drags her away.
SEBASTIAN (CONT'D)
We have to go.
INT, PYRAMID - CHAMBER OF PILLAR 91.
They race into a long corridor filled with rough hewn stone
PILLARS and GIGANTIC CHAINS. The chamber is vast, but the
pillars make it hard to see too far ahead. Anytqing could be
hiding in here.
Lex looks at her digital wrist compass.
LEX
We keep moving and stay on the
heading. We keep it together. Make
it to the surface.

SEBASTIAN (V.O.)
Total genocide.
Just at the moment when the Predators are about to be
ove.rwhelmed, they activate their SELF DESTRUCT mechanism. A
powerful shockwave sweeps across the pyramids, vaporizing
everything in its path. Scattering Aliens before it, blowing
them limb from limb. Like a miniature atomic bomb
* * *
SEBASTIAN (V.O.) (CONT'D) *
An entire civilization wiped out *
overnight. *
The searing white light of the explosion OBLITERATES the
image -- *

Sebastian looks up from the hieroglyphics.

INT. PYRAMID - ALIEN QUEEN'S CHAMBER
September 26, 2003 82.
NB.
The Alien Queen is forced to watch another batch of her eggs
taken away from her by the automated conveyor belt. The
Alien Queen is going berserk. Fighting against her chains,
but to. no avail. She lets out a piercing SHRIEK that ECHOES
through the Pyramid. *
INT. PYRAMID - LABYRINTH - LONG CORRIDOR 111.
CLOSE ON GRID as the leader of the Alien pack suddenly turns.
He has heard his mother's cry.
INT. PYRAMID - LABYRINTH - DEAD END CHAMBER 112.
Scar then takes Lex's knife and jabs at the dead Alien's body
as Lex starts to process everything. She's almost on auto­
pilot. She can't believe what she's saying.
LEX.
(softly)
You need my help.
He looks at her strangely. And then walks away.

horror of this moment entirely from her tortured perspective. *
Sebastian's agonized screaming comes to an abrupt end. *
Scar watches her closely. From his reaction, he appears to *
respect her more and more with every decision she makes. *
SCAR'S PREDATOR VISION: We see Sebastian's dead body slumped *
on the floor. His body begins to convulse. Sebastian's skin *
begins to distend. *
THE ALIEN CHEST BURSTER leaps through the air. With
lightening-fast reflexes, Scar catches it. *
CLOSE ON SCAR as he holds the newly born Alien up to his *
face. He turns it in his hand, examining it. *
CLOSE ON THE ALIEN. Its teeth snapping at Scar's face. *
Unbelievably vicious. Then in one simple move, Scar casually *
SNAPS its neck between his fingers. Just like it were a *
matchstick. *
INT. PYRAMID - ALIEN QUEEN'S CHAMBER 114. *
The Alien Queen hangs from her chains, a prisoner. Slowly, *
dark figures emerge from the shadows of the chamber. .Aliens . *
Her children. Led by Grid. They almost seem to bow in *
supplic.ation to the Alien Queen. Then, as a group, they LEAP *
upon their mother. Their claws and mouths TEARING at her *
flesh in a frenzied attack. The Alien Queen begins to bleed. *
Her hissing, burning blood flying everywhere. Her acid blood *
begins to eat through the chains. And only now do we realize *
what the Aliens are doing -- *
